'''Odnalor Chull''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Klatooinian/Legends|Klatooinian]] thief who lived during the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was wanted by [[Kukul]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] for repeatedly stealing finished starships from [[Guarja Shipyards]] on [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]]. He was killed by [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] on [[Outland Transit Station]], where he had fled to from [[Mos Gamos]] in the hopes of surviving Kukul's wrath. Desperate for money, he was working as a guard for crime boss [[Meeko Ghintee]] at the time of his final encounter with Fett.

==Behind the scenes==
His [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] is worth 2,000 credits alive and 1,000 dead, depending on the player's decision.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
